title: abutilon crispum
intro: Abutilon crispum, also known as the flowering mapou or flowering mallows, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon crispum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it is also used as a treatment for sore throats and coughs. Abutilon crispum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat its various health benefits.
